title: Senior iOS-utvecklare
description:
Startdatum: 3-4 veckor
  

Slutdatum: 12 månader med option på förlängning  

Omfattning: 100%  

Plats: Stockholm / Hybrid

### **Uppdragsbeskrivning**


En större offentlig verksamhet söker en senior iOS-utvecklare till sitt appteam inom området digitala försäljningskanaler och betalningslösningar. Teamet ansvarar för vidareutveckling och förvaltning av en etablerad mobilapplikation med en stor användarbas.


Du blir en del av ett tvärfunktionellt, agilt team bestående av cirka tio personer med roller såsom produktägare, utvecklare, testare, UX och coachande funktioner. Rollen innebär både nyutveckling och vidareutveckling i befintlig arkitektur, med höga krav på kodkvalitet, prestanda och tillgänglighet.


Arbetet sker nära andra iOS-utvecklare där kontinuerlig code review och samarbete är en naturlig del av vardagen. Du samverkar även med arkitekter, designers och andra utvecklingsteam inom organisationen samt deltar i dialog med olika intressenter.


Arbetsspråk är svenska i både tal och skrift.

### **Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:**

* Vidareutveckla och förvalta en iOS-applikation med stor användarbas
* Implementera avancerade lösningar i Swift och SwiftUI
* Säkerställa hög prestanda, stabilitet och kodkvalitet
* Arbeta strukturerat med tillgänglighet (exempelvis WCAG och VoiceOver)
* Delta i och genomföra code reviews samt parprogrammering
* Bidra till tekniska förbättringar och arkitektoniska beslut


Vi söker både anställda konsulter och underkonsulter.

### **Skall-krav**

* Flera års heltidserfarenhet av iOS-utveckling
* Flera års erfarenhet av utveckling i Swift, varav minst 2 år med SwiftUI, inklusive arbete med generics, error handling, memory management, async/await och avancerad UI-komposition
* 6 månaders erfarenhet av att utveckla en iOS-applikation med minst 100 000 användare
* Erfarenhet från minst två projekt där tekniska förbättringar lett till mätbara resultat, samt haft en nyckelroll i minst ett av dessa
* Några års erfarenhet av tillgänglighetsanpassad apputveckling (ex. WCAG, VoiceOver)
* Erfarenhet av parprogrammering och löpande code review i minst ett uppdrag
* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT eller motsvarande
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift

### **Meriterande**

* Erfarenhet av att bidra till eller driva strategiska teknikval och innovationsinitiativ inom apputveckling
* Erfarenhet av agilt teamarbete tillsammans med andra iOS-utvecklare
* Några års erfarenhet av arbete i designverktyg såsom Figma, Sketch, Abstract eller Zeplin

title: Fullstackutvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsultkollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Minst 10 års erfarenhet av systemutveckling
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av TypeScript
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av React
* Djup erfarenhet av databaser och SQL
* Erfarenhet av Git i team-baserad utveckling
* Lång erfarenhet av att arbeta i agila team
* Erfarenhet av att designa och implementera dataflöden (REST, köer m.m.)
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av köhantering (t.ex. AWS SQS, ActiveMQ, Azure Service Bus eller liknande)
* Erfarenhet av Azure DevOps

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 06-03-2026 **Om Oss**  

Att jobba på Deploja är något helt annat än att arbeta på ett vanligt konsultbolag – och det är vi riktigt stolta över. Vad är det då som gör oss unika?

  

Vi erbjuder helt enkelt mer än bara hög lön och större frihet, det är bara början. Hos oss hittar du den arbetsmiljö och de möjligheter du förtjänar. Här påverkar du din egen lön som helt och hållet som baseras på ditt timpris mot kund.


Vår lönemodell är en hybridlösning mellan en fast månadslön och en provisionsbaserad ersättning. Det innebär att din månadslön baseras på ditt timpris, fast om du mot förmodan skulle stå utan uppdrag så behåller du en grund lön fram tills vi hittat ett nytt uppdrag, bra va?

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstebil – vi uppmuntrar dig att välja en elbil för en mer hållbar framtid.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.


Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?


Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.

  

Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.


Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?  

  

*Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.*

title: Senior Backend Utvecklare till Intinor
description:
*På* ***Intinor*** *bygger vi teknologi som möjliggör högkvalitativ video och ljud över internet – från live-sändningar och nyhetsproduktion till esport och fjärrproduktionslösningar. Med över 20 års erfarenhet i branschen utvecklar vi egna produkter och plattformar som används av såväl mindre produktionsbolag som stora TV-stationer världen över. Vi är ett tight, engagerat team baserat i Umeå som kombinerar teknisk spetskompetens med entreprenörsanda och en passion för robust, skalbar mjukvara. Vår vision är att skapa marknadens mest pålitliga och innovativa lösningar för video över IP, där du i rollen som senior backendutvecklare spelar en central roll i att driva våra produkter framåt.*  

  

***Vad kommer du att göra?***


Som Backendutvecklare hos Intinor blir du en del av teamet som utvecklar och vidareutvecklar våra egna produkter för professionell videodistribution. Du arbetar nära både hårdvara och mjukvara i en tekniskt avancerad miljö där stabilitet, prestanda och säkerhet är avgörande.


Du kommer att:

* Utveckla och förbättra backend-funktionalitet i våra produkter och SaaS-lösningar
* Arbeta med C, Ruby (Rails) och Rust i en modern teknikstack
* Designa och optimera API:er och systemarkitektur
* Bidra till skalbara, robusta och säkra lösningar för realtidsvideo
* Vara delaktig och drivande i tekniska vägval och produktutveckling tillsammans med teamet
* Bidra till att stärka våra utvecklingsflöden och arbetssätt över tid


Hos oss jobbar du nära produkten, användarna och besluten, där du ser resultatet av din kod.

***Vem tror vi att du är?***


Vi tror att du har en akademisk examen inom teknisk fysik, datavetenskap eller annan utbildning vi bedömer likvärdig. Du har minst 10 års erfarenhet som utvecklare med god förståelse för systemarkitektur och har gärna varit med och byggt eller vidareutvecklat SaaS-produkter. Du är van att ta tekniskt ansvar och känner dig trygg i att bidra till och fatta beslut kring teknikval. Vår backendstack består av C, Ruby on Rails och Rust. Vi tror att du behärskar flera av dessa väl, men erfarenhet från motsvarande tekniker är också relevant och värdefull. Som senior utvecklare hos oss förväntas du ha en förmåga att se och förstå hela systemflödet. Har du erfarenhet av DevOps och moderna utvecklingsflöden är det ett plus, men inget krav.


Utöver det är du nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och prestigelös. Du delar gärna med dig av din kunskap, samarbetar lätt med andra och drivs av att tillsammans skapa robusta lösningar som håller över tid.


Extra plus om du har intresse för streaming, nätverk eller systemnära utveckling. Har du en fallenhet för AI och ser det som ett kraftfullt stöd i utvecklingsarbetet och nyfiken för att utforska hur det kan användas i vår vardag är det en möjlighet.

***Varför ska du jobba hos Intinor?***


Hos Intinor får du arbeta med teknik som används varje dag, världen över. Våra lösningar driver live-sändningar, nyhetsproduktion och samhällskritisk kommunikation där stabilitet och kvalitet är avgörande. Vi är ett mindre produktbolag där samarbete är A&O. Vi bygger tillsammans, delar ansvar och driver utvecklingen framåt gemensamt, men där frihet under ansvar också är en självklarhet. Här förväntas du inte bara utveckla du förväntas bidra och ta beslut kring teknik och arkitektur som formar produktens långsiktiga riktning. Sen förväntas vi ha roligt på vägen – tillsammans.

**Ansökan**  

I denna rekrytering har Intinor valt att samarbeta med Talentify. Har du frågor om tjänsten eller processen är du välkommen att höra av dig till Hanna Grahn; **hanna@talentify.se** alt. ring 0764148330 för ett första samtal.

title: Senior Golang Developer - Developer Platform Team
description:
**Senior Golang Developer - Developer Platform Team**



The Leaseweb API is the front door for our services to the world. The API will be powering all Leasewebs websites, dashboards and in- and external applications. For the Leaseweb Developer Platform team we are seeking for a Software Developer to build the best API in the hosting market and supporting platforms.


**Product Engineering at Leaseweb**



Our team of approximately 90 engineers is working in small scrum teams. Each team has end to end responsibility for a specific product or part of our architecture. We work on a remote-first basis, coming together in person at our Amsterdam headquarters twice a year.



Our organizational structure is flat, placing a high value on independence and entrepreneurship. The atmosphere is informal and relaxed, creating a highly motivating work environment in which you will work with some of the most inspiring colleagues in the industry.


**What is the role about?**



As Senior Golang Developer for the Developer Platform team, you are responsible for applying your specialism to support the team with operations and R&D. You work with the different product teams to define, architect and review new APIs. You will interact with the developer community, represent Leaseweb API and participate in developer events to improve the API.



Furthermore, you will design, implement and support applications, tools and platforms which support our development teams and customers, for example our authentication platform, abuse platform and others.



Technologies you will be working with are (but not limited to) PHP, Elastic Stack, Chef, Terraform and more.


**What we’re looking for?**


* At least 5 years of experience with software development
* Experience with API Development
* Proven and demonstrable programming skills; **with a strong preference for Golang**; PHP experience is also valued
* Experience building libraries and/or SDKs
* Knowledge of creating a Terraform plugin is a pre
* Knowledge of OAuth2 protocol is a pre
* Experience in setting up software architectures
* Demonstrable knowledge of Linux
* Knowledge of version control systems (Git)
* Experience with Agile development methods such as scrum is a pre
* Strength in problem analysis and conceptual thinking
* Driven to improve quality and prevent incidents.
* Excellent communication skills (English is a must, Dutch would be an advantage)

  


**Benefits include :**


* Participation in annual company bonus scheme and company pension
* Internet allowance
* Working from home policy
* Work from abroad: Up to 4 weeks per year, following policy guidelines
* Lease bike plan
* 25 days of paid time off (and the option to buy or sell up to 5 more days)
* Free lunch, parking, and fresh fruit provided when in the office
* Access to the Leaseweb Academy, a personalized learning platform offering a variety of studies, (Dutch) courses, and trainings
* Attractive relocation packages and an agency that takes care of the entire visa process
* Fun events year-round – from virtual pub quizzes to summer parties, company runs, quarterly hackathons and much more
* A multicultural work environment (our colleagues are from over 60 countries!) in a company where you can truly make a difference


**Ready for the next step?**


If you’d like to apply, please do so online. To learn more about us, follow us on LinkedIn or Instagram to get an inside look at life at Leaseweb. For questions, please reach out to Merve Bulazar, Talent Acquisition Specialist, at: m.bulazar@global.leaseweb.com.


***We directly source all candidates – any unsolicited profiles received from recruitment agencies will be treated as direct applications.***

title: Full stack Web Developer
description:
Web Services is a tight-knit team of experienced Developers, UX/UI Designers and Creators at Paradox Interactive, and we are now looking for a Full stack Web Developer to join the team.
   

  

 As a Developer in the Web team you will be an integral part of our highly collaborative Marketing organization, working closely together with our designers and content creators in supporting our games with digital products, campaigns and experiences.
   

  

 We work on a wide array of projects, from conceptualizing, developing and deploying custom digital experiences for our games, to maintaining our e-commerce platform and corporate website, and more.
   

  

**The Skills We’re Searching For…**
 As a developer you have 3+ years of documented professional experience developing, shipping and maintaining large-scale digital products and platforms. An active interest and a keen eye for user-friendly design is a huge plus.
   

  

**Requirements**
* Professional experience with ReactJS, NextJS or other similar SSR/SSG framework
* Advanced proficiency with modern JavaScript (ES6+)
* Experience with NodeJS backend development
* Advanced proficiency with CSS with great attention to detail for creating engaging user experiences
* Knowledge within API and GraphQL development, and database management
* Hands-on experience in managing e-commerce and CRM ecosystems


**You as a candidate**
 You are a collaborative and responsible individual with great communication skills. You can identify and present viable solutions and challenges, while at the same time producing and delivering finalized features.
   

  

 Teamwork and close communication both within and outside the team is a must, with excellent written and verbal English for everything work related. Experience from working in a Marketing context with focus on business value is a big plus.
   

  

**Practical information**
**Scope:** 
 Full-time and permanent at the Stockholm office
   

  

**Reports to:** 
 Head of Web Services
   

  

**Location:** 
 This position is based in Stockholm, Sweden

title: Fullstack Developer - Node
description:
At Hemnet, we do more than power Sweden’s leading property platform. We help people take one of life’s biggest steps: finding a home. Join a cross-functional product team where your voice truly matters. As a Senior Fullstack Engineer with a strong focus on Node.js, you’ll combine hands-on development with technical leadership. You’ll help shape our backend architecture, contribute to frontend experiences, and mentor fellow engineers as we evolve toward a modern, service-oriented platform.
   

  

 We’re in the middle of an architectural transformation, moving from a monolithic structure toward a service-oriented architecture. Your experience building scalable Node.js services will be key in driving this journey forward.
   

  

**About The Role 🍏** 
  

  

 You’ll be part of a team responsible for a data-driven product that helps real estate agents make smarter decisions. Right now, the team is focusing on building financial solutions that create tangible business value for our users. In this role, you will:
   

  

* Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services using Node.js and Nest.js
* Contribute to frontend development in React
* Support and evolve APIs (GraphQL and REST)
* Play an active role in our transition toward a service-oriented architecture
* Break down complex problems and help decompose monolithic systems into modular services
* Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Designers, and Engineers to deliver impactful solutions
* Lead technical discussions and mentor team members
* Continuously improve code quality, performance, and developer experience
* Contribute to an inclusive team culture where different perspectives are valued


  

  

**Who we think you are** 
 🤩
   

  

 You care about architecture, scalability, and clean code and you enjoy helping others grow. We believe you bring:
   

  

* Several years of experience as a Fullstack Engineer
* Strong hands-on experience with Node.js (preferably Nest.js or similar frameworks)
* Experience building and maintaining large-scale applications
* Practical knowledge of decomposing monoliths and designing service-oriented or microservice architectures
* Experience with React on the frontend
* Comfort working with APIs (GraphQL and/or REST)
* An openness to working with and learning Ruby
* A coaching mindset, you enjoy guiding others and fostering strong technical discussions
* A collaborative approach and appreciation for diversity of thought and background


  

  

**I am your new manager 👋** 
  

  

 Hi!
   

  

 My name is Tomas, and I’ll be your new manager. I’ve been at Hemnet since 2022 and am currently working as Head of Engineering in our domain called B2B. I’m really excited to support the teams that will be working on many new and important areas for Hemnet, including a data tool for agents to help them make more informed decisions as well as financial solutions for agents.
   

  

 My leadership style is listening, transparent, accessible, and supportive, while also challenging you to take your next step. Hopefully, we’ll learn a lot from each other and have plenty of fun as we break new ground at Hemnet. As a team, we get things done; we know when and where value can be added, and we’re clear on our priorities.
   

  

 Why did I decide to join Hemnet? I was strongly drawn to the culture and atmosphere – a wonderful combination of kindness, inclusiveness, and helpfulness, paired with high ambitions and a strong drive forward. My impression is that the people and the workplace together create the perfect foundation for you to do the best work of your career.
   

  

 At Hemnet, we believe tech is better when built together. If you want to shape not only code but also the future of Sweden’s most loved housing platform, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**A Note on Inclusion** 
 💚
   

  

 At Hemnet, we believe that diversity in gender, sexual orientation, ability, neurodiversity, cultural background and life experience makes us stronger. We welcome applicants of all identities and backgrounds.
   

  

 If you meet many but not all of the requirements, we encourage you to apply. We value curiosity, a strong sense of purpose and the motivation to learn and grow, alongside your skills and experiences.
   

  

**A Hybrid Way of Working** 
 🚲
   

  

 Our vibrant office in central Stockholm is the hub of our collaboration and culture, providing a lively space that fosters team spirit. We come together in the office three days a week, with two flexible remote days. To be part of our team, it’s essential to be based in or near Stockholm.

title: Frontend dev
description:
**Introduction😀**

 Are you a talented Frontend Developer looking for an exciting opportunity to make a significant impact? At ludwigh, we are on the lookout for a passionate individual who thrives in a dynamic environment and is dedicated to enhancing customer experiences through innovative web solutions. Based in the vibrant city of Stockholm, Sweden, this position offers you the chance to work in a collaborative team where your ideas and contributions will be valued. Join us in our mission to create exceptional digital experiences that resonate with our customers and elevate our brand.
   

  




**About the role**

 As a Frontend Developer at ludwigh, you will play a crucial role in shaping the user experience of our digital platforms. Your main focus will be on developing responsive and visually appealing web applications that not only meet but exceed customer expectations. You will work closely with designers, backend developers, and product managers to implement features that enhance functionality and usability. This role requires a blend of creativity and technical expertise, allowing you to push the boundaries of web development while ensuring our customers receive the best possible service. If you are driven by a desire to innovate and improve, this is the perfect opportunity for you.
   

  




**Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain high-quality web applications using modern frontend technologies.
* Collaborate with UX/UI designers to create visually appealing and user-friendly interfaces.
* Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.
* Participate in code reviews and contribute to team knowledge sharing.
* Debug and troubleshoot application issues to ensure a seamless user experience.
* Stay up-to-date with the latest industry trends and best practices in frontend development.


**Qualifications**

 The ideal candidate will possess a strong educational background in Computer Science, Web Development, or a related field, along with proven experience as a Frontend Developer. A robust portfolio showcasing your work on previous projects will be essential in demonstrating your skills and creativity. Familiarity with agile methodologies and experience working in a collaborative team environment will also be beneficial. We are looking for someone who is not only technically proficient but also enthusiastic about customer service and committed to going the extra mile to ensure customer satisfaction.
   

  




**Skills**
* Proficient in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, with a strong understanding of frontend frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js.
* Experience with version control systems, particularly Git.
* Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written.
* Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively within a team.
* Familiarity with responsive design principles and modern development tools.


**Benefits**

 At ludwigh, we understand that our employees are our greatest asset. We offer a competitive salary and a comprehensive benefits package designed to support your well-being and career growth. Our work environment encourages creativity and innovation, providing you with the resources you need to excel. Additionally, we promote a healthy work-life balance, offering flexible working hours and opportunities for remote work. You will also have access to professional development programs, allowing you to enhance your skills and advance your career within our organization.
   

  

  

  

  

  




**How to Apply**

 If you are excited about the opportunity to join ludwigh as a Frontend Developer, we would love to hear from you! Please submit your resume along with a cover letter detailing your relevant experience and why you believe you would be a great fit for our team. Additionally, include a portfolio or links to your previous work that showcases your skills and creativity. Applications can be sent to our HR department at [insert email address]. We look forward to reviewing your application and potentially welcoming you to our team in Stockholm!

title: Full-stack developer
description:
ALTEN is a world leader in Engineering and Technology Consulting with almost 60 000 employees, 88% of whom are engineers. Operating in more than 30 countries, the Group supports its customers' development strategy in the areas of engineering, innovation, R&D and technological information systems.
   

  

 Why choose ALTEN?
   

  

* It is a great opportunity to take part in the greatest technological challenges
* Working in a collaborative work environment provides close support
* We are a real career booster in France and abroad


**Description Du Poste**
 We are looking for FullStack Developers to join us through a VIE (Volontariat International en Entreprise) program. This is the opportunity to work on impactful, real world projects within a modern tech environment and collaborate closely with talented teams across Europe!
   

  

 As a FullStack Developer, you'll work with :
   

  

* .NET backend and React and/or Angular on the frontend
* Building high-quality, user focused applications deployed on AWS.
* You’ll be involved in the entire development lifecycle from architecture and coding to testing and cloud deployment while contributing to innovative features in an agile, fast-paced environment.


**Qualifications**
* Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Embedded Systems Engineering, or a related field
* First experience with .Net and React or Angular
* Knowledge of AWS
* Strong analytical mindset, attention to detail, and problem-solving abilities
* Ability to work effectively in a multicultural and collaborative engineering environment
* Fluent in English, both spoken and written


**Informations supplémentaires**
**What We Offer** 
  

  

 Innovation, growth, and fulfillment are at the heart of our vision at ALTEN.
   

  

* Innovation: Engage in cutting-edge technological projects in an environment that values creativity and the pursuit of innovative solutions.
* Growth: Enjoy personalized support with training and certifications to develop your expertise and advance in our various areas: Specialists, Project Management, Business Management, and Support Functions.
* Fulfillment: ALTEN places great importance on recognizing the potential of each individual. Join a company committed to civic and solidarity projects, and participate in initiatives that make a difference.


**ALTEN's Commitment**
 Our three pillars of commitment to sustainability:
   

  

* People: We celebrate the richness of our diverse workforce, representing over 100 nationalities. Our commitment is to cultivate an inclusive environment where everyone can grow and make meaningful contributions. We support skill acquisition and actively assist our talents in their personal and professional development.
* Environment: Our mission is to minimize our environmental impact by promoting sustainable growth. We are committed to achieving net-zero emissions by 2050, a goal that guides our operations and strategic initiatives.
* Sustainable Innovation: At ALTEN, we view sustainability challenges as opportunities to drive research and innovation. With 31% of our internal R&D focused on sustainable innovation, we are determined to transform these challenges into solutions that create value and drive progress.


 Ready to take on the challenge? Apply now and embark on a career where every project is an opportunity to learn, innovate, and thrive!

title: Frontend Developer
description:
**Om FJORNIX** 

 FJORNIX är en svensk teknologiaktör som levererar innovativa och skalbara lösningar som hjälper verksamheter att ligga i framkant. Genom tjänster inom moln, cybersäkerhet, digital transformation och mjukvaruutveckling arbetar FJORNIX nära sina kunder för att skapa hållbara och framtidssäkra tekniska lösningar. Med en kombination av global expertis och lokal förståelse stöttar företaget organisationer i alla storlekar att optimera sina processer och förbereda sig för morgondagens möjligheter. FJORNIX strävar efter att driva innovation, skapa värde och bygga långsiktigt förtroende.
 


**Om uppdraget** 

 Vi söker en erfaren Frontendutvecklare för ett konsultuppdrag inom en modern och teknikintensiv miljö. Uppdraget innebär att utveckla skalbar, testbar och prestandaoptimerad frontendkod i nära samarbete med utvecklingsteam, arkitekter och produktägare. Arbetet sker enligt etablerade agila metoder med fokus på kvalitet och kontinuerlig förbättring.
 


**Behörighetskrav (Shell‑krav)** 
**Obligatoriska krav** 
* Minst fyra (4) års dokumenterad erfarenhet som frontendutvecklare, införskaffad inom de senaste fem (5) åren.
* Minst ett (1) års praktisk erfarenhet av CI/CD.
* Minst fyra (4) års praktisk erfarenhet av att designa och skriva tester för frontendkod.
* Minst fyra (4) års praktisk erfarenhet av TypeScript.
* Minst fyra (4) års erfarenhet av att designa och använda REST‑API:er.
* Minst fyra (4) års erfarenhet av utveckling enligt agilt arbetssätt.
* Minst ett (1) års erfarenhet av att utveckla prestandakänslig frontendkod.
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka sig i tal och skrift på svenska.


**Meriterande kompetens** 
* Erfarenhet av att bygga, packa och deploya frontendkod.
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom säkerhetsklassad verksamhet.


**Handlingar som ska bifogas vid ansökan** 
* Uppdaterat CV på svenska



  




**Personliga egenskaper** 

 Vi söker dig som är analytisk, strukturerad och kvalitetsmedveten. Du trivs i teamorienterade miljöer men har samtidigt en stark förmåga att arbeta självständigt. Du är trygg i din tekniska kompetens och har en naturlig drivkraft att bidra till robusta och långsiktiga lösningar.
 


**Teknologier och arbetssätt som förekommer i uppdraget** 
* Frontendutveckling
* TypeScript
* Testautomatisering
* REST‑API
* CI/CD
* Agilt arbetssätt
* Prestandaoptimering


**Ansökan** 
* Skicka in din ansökan inklusive CV och kompetensmatris. Urval sker löpande.

title: Backend Developer Intern
description:
**Backend Developer Intern — Remote | XR Solutions** 




  





**Who we are** 




 We build AR tools for industrial environments — factory floors, heavy machinery, complex maintenance workflows. Machine learning makes them smart, and our engineering team makes them reliable. We're a small company, which means less bureaucracy and more ownership. Everything we build goes to production and gets used by real people.
 



  





**The role** 




 You'll work alongside experienced developers to build and maintain the backend services behind our AR platform. This isn't a "shadow someone and take notes" kind of internship — you'll be writing production code from the start.
 



  





 You'll work with:
 


* Node.js & Express for building REST APIs
* PostgreSQL & Sequelize for database design and queries
* AWS for cloud infrastructure and deployment
* Git (we use Bitbucket) for version control



  





**What your week actually looks like** 



* Building and maintaining APIs that our AR applications rely on
* Designing database schemas and keeping queries fast
* Connecting backend services to ML pipelines and AR-facing systems
* Writing unit and integration tests — we don't ship what we can't verify
* Participating in code reviews, both giving and receiving feedback
* Picking up DevOps tasks as you get more comfortable with AWS



  





**What we're looking for** 




 Someone comfortable with Node.js, Express, and TypeScript. PostgreSQL experience helps — even if it's from personal or school projects. You should know your way around Git and understand the basics of how APIs work under the hood. If you've used AWS, CI/CD pipelines, or Sequelize before, that's a nice bonus, but we'll teach what's missing.
 



 More than tools, we care that you're genuinely curious, write clean code, and learn quickly without needing everything spelled out.
 



  





  





 This starts as an unpaid position. People who do strong, consistent work move into a paid role. We know unpaid is a big ask, so we take the experience side seriously — real production code, real mentorship, and real exposure to how scalable systems are built and maintained.
 



  





**What you walk away with** 



* Backend experience on a live, shipped product — not a sandbox project
* Working knowledge of AWS, API design, and cloud architecture in production
* Solid testing and security fundamentals you'll use everywhere
* And if things go well — a paid role on the team



  





 If you’re excited about this opportunity and eager to learn, please send your resume outlining your interest in the position. We look forward to helping you grow your skills and advance your career in backend development.

title: Software Developer / Application Engineer
description:
**Professional Galaxy** 
 is an IT and technology consulting company that provides highly specialized expertise within IT, software development, SAP, purchasing, electronics and mechanical design. We collaborate with experienced senior experts and deliver strategic value-creating expertise to some of Sweden's most complex and analytically demanding projects. Our focus is always on high quality, professionalism and clear, measurable results.
   

  

 We are now seeking a
 **Software Developer** 
 for one of our clients.
   

  

**Assignment Description﻿**
* Work as a software developer supporting our application engineering teams in delivering systems to customers across Europe, Asia, Africa, and Oceania.
* Partner with customer experts to configure applications according to their requirements.
* Design and implement efficient workflow integrations between SCADA/EMS/GMS systems and other IT/OT environments, using modern interface and integration technologies.
* Prepare, carry out, and document test plans with customers to ensure solutions meet contractual and functional requirements.
* Support customers in learning and operating EMS/GMS functions within our systems.
* Help diagnose and resolve technical issues together with our technical teams.
* Contribute your expertise to proposal and tender work to enable high‑quality, competitive bids.


**Qualifications / Experience / Skills**
* A Master’s degree (or equivalent experience) in energy systems, electrical engineering, computer science, or a related field.
* Fundamental understanding of power generation and transmission networks.
* Basic knowledge of SCADA systems.
* Experience with programming languages such as C, C++, or FORTRAN.
* Ability and willingness to occasionally travel for customer work on occasions
* Strong analytical, communication, and collaboration skills—especially in multicultural and cross‑functional environments.
* Proficiency in English, both written and spoken.


**Location:** 
 Sweden
   

  

**Assignment start:** 
 2026-04-01
   

  

**Remote work:** 
 Yes
   

  

**Assignment duration:** 
 1 year
   

  

**Application Deadline:** 
 2026-03-15
   

  

 Are you the right person for the assignment, or do you want to recommend a strong candidate? Do not hesitate to contact us.
   

  

 Please apply directly through our system with:
   

  

* Your updated CV in english
* Availability to start the assignment


 In the motivation, describe why you are suitable for this assignment - refer to previous consulting assignments, employmxent, education and personal qualities.
   

  

**Please note:** 
 We do not accept any applications through mail. All applications have to be sent through the portal to be valid.
   

  

**Offer continuously:** 
 Please note that for this role we offer continuously. That means that we sometimes remove the assignments before the deadline. If you are interested, we recommend that you apply immediately.

title: Back End Developer
description:
We are looking to hire a Senior Backend Engineer working with Golang for one of Stockholm's leading in house companies that are continually changing their industry!
 



  





 As a Backend Engineer you will be an integral part of a highly creative team focused on building powerful and reusable infrastructure and backend components for our product.

 Sound interesting?
 



 Apply today!

title: Full stack ML developer.
description:
**Stack & Technology:** 




  




* **ML & Geospatial:** 
  Google Earth Engine (JavaScript API), Random Forest (primary model), support for multiple ML models.
* **Frontend:** 
  Next.js (TypeScript/JavaScript), Vercel hosting.
* **Backend:** 
  Supabase (authentication, PostgreSQL).
* **Data:** 
  SGU (Geological Survey of Sweden) geological datasets (GeoPackage, Shapefile, raster data), Landsat satellite imagery.



  





**What we are looking for:** 




  




* Experienced in ML for geospatial data, specifically Google Earth Engine and Earth observation data.
* Solid understanding of working with spatial data in an ML context (raster data, vector data, coordinate systems).
* Experience in feature engineering with multi-modal data, or comfortable collaborating closely with GIS designers to evaluate and select relevant geological features.
* A systematic approach to model optimization and an openness to evaluating and implementing new ML methods beyond our existing models.
* **Bonus/Merit:** 
  Experience in developing and structuring training data from uncategorized raw data. We possess hundreds of GBs of proprietary drilling logs in PDF format that need to be scanned, digitized, and converted into formats compatible with Google Earth Engine.



  





 You will work for a partnership!

title: ServiceNow Developer
description:
**ServiceNow Developer – Fokus på CMDB & CSDM** 




 Vill du vara med och bygga upp och vidareutveckla en stark CMDB-struktur i en modern ServiceNow-miljö? Nu söker vi erfarna
 **ServiceNow CMDB Developers** 
 som vill vara en del av ett dedikerat CMDB-team med fokus på långsiktig kvalitet, governance och affärsvärde.
 



  





**Om uppdraget** 




 Du kommer att arbeta i ett eget ServiceNow CMDB-team med fokus på:
 


* Projekt kopplade till
 **CMDB Data Quality**
* Implementering och vidareutveckling av
 **Common Service Data Model (CSDM)**
* Säkerställande av långsiktiga värden från genomförda projekt
* Vidareutveckling och förvaltning av CMDB Governance-modellen
* Arbete med att minska teknisk skuld och gå mot mer “out-of-the-box”-lösningar



 Vi söker dig som inte bara kan plattformen tekniskt – utan också förstår kopplingen mellan CMDB, processer och affärsvärde.
 



  





**Vi söker dig som har:** 



* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av
 **implementering av CSDM i ServiceNow**
* Gedigen kunskap och praktisk erfarenhet av
 **CMDB i ServiceNow** 
 , inklusive vanliga fallgropar
* Flera års erfarenhet som
 **ServiceNow Developer**
* Erfarenhet från projekt där fokus varit att minska anpassningar och teknisk skuld
* Förståelse för sambandet mellan affärsvärde och CMDB-processer
* Ett agilt mindset
* En stark teamkänsla och god samarbetsförmåga



  





**Teknologier & kompetensområden** 



* ServiceNow Platform
* CMDB
* CSDM
* Projektledning



  





**Vi erbjuder** 



* Möjlighet att arbeta strategiskt med CMDB i en långsiktig satsning
* Ett dedikerat och kompetent team
* Utmanande och värdeskapande projekt
* Stor möjlighet att påverka governance och arbetssätt



  





**Uppdragsinformation** 




 Plats: Stockholm
 



 Start: Så snart som möjligt
 



 Omfattning: 100 %
 



  





**Kontakt** 




 För frågor om uppdraget, kontakta ansvarig Business Manager,
 **Joanna Nyström @** 
 joanna.nystrom@akkodisgroup.com
 



  





**Om Akkodis** 




 På Akkodis är du som konsult vår högsta prioritet. Vi stöttar dig i din karriärutveckling och erbjuder uppdrag i olika branscher, system och miljöer. Du omfattas av kollektivavtal, försäkringar, friskvårdsbidrag och rabatter på träningskort. Vi ordnar regelbundet sociala aktiviteter och arbetar tillsammans för att skapa framtidens lösningar inom IT och Engineering.
 



  





 Varm välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for Senior Software Engineer with focus on Java, Linux and Kubernetes to team up with the most dedicated team of cyber specialists in our Secure Development domain.**
**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company**
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond, and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we employ around 350 employees – and as cybercrime grows, we need to grow. To support that goal, we are now looking for a senior software engineer who wants to create advanced security solutions together with our Secure Development team.
   

  

**Secure Development**
 Applications and custom solutions are currently popular targets for threat actors. In modern application development, security must be present throughout all aspects of the development process. Our engagements span from AppSec-related security workshops, educating organizations in secure coding and DevSecOps, to longer assignments where we write code responsibly as integrated team members. We are a cyber tech company with our own custom software and services that we leverage both during assignments and with our clients. Our assignments requires strong and secure collaboration within the teams. We are very proud about our offices in the central part of Malmö and Stockholm, in which we strive to meet as much as possible and engage in deep technical discussions and several social activities.
   

  

**The Role**
 Together with a team of highly skilled and experienced developers you will design, build and maintain systems that have high expectations on availability, performance and obviously security. We take pride in building some of the most important features and functionalities of our clients systems and with a solid history of several years of delivery. You will be challenged to consider and understand potential threats and vulnerabilities against your code, the overall application and its users. We expect you to appreciate working in a team but also be able to take on tasks and issues individually.
   

  

**Your Potential Background**
 We think that you have a couple of years of building and maintaining Java applications, hopefully feel comfortable in Linux environments and have understanding in the benefits and design of container-based apps with Kubernetes. You talk the talk, and walk the walk, meaning you are passionate about continuously learning new skills while being aware of your own strengths and potential weaknesses, surrounding yourself with peers that fill the gaps and learn from each other.
   

  

**Required Skills:**
* Java EE or Spring
* Linux, RedHat/Ubuntu
* Docker/Kubernetes


**Bonus Skills:**
* Microservices architecture
* Cloud native design and development
* Application Security/threat modeling/vulnerability management


*Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.*
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: Embedded Software Engineer – Automotive (C / RTOS / CAN)
description:
Greetings !!
 



  





 About the Organization
 



  





 We are hiring an experienced
 **Embedded Software Engineer** 
 for a leading global engineering organization working on advanced

 If you have strong experience in

 Key Responsibilities
 


* Translate software requirements into detailed design and implementation
* Develop new features and enhancements within a shared embedded codebase
* Ensure compliance with

* Develop and execute unit test cases with
 **MC/DC coverage validation**
* Support integration testing and resolve defects
* Maintain traceability across requirements, design, and test artifacts
* Collaborate with architects, system engineers, and validation teams



 🎯 Required Qualifications
 


* Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering
* 4+ years of experience in embedded software or safety-critical systems
* Strong programming skills in
 **Embedded C**
* Experience with
 **CAN and Diagnostics**

 **RTOS (FreeRTOS preferred)**

 ➕ Preferred Skills
 


* MCAL layer embedded C development

 **UART, Serial Communication & I/O debugging**

 Interested candidates can share their updated CV via LinkedIn message or mail me at waheeda.khan@bigjobz.in for further discussion.
 



  





 Please do mention
 



 CTC
 



 EXPCTC
 



 Notice Period
 



 do you have the Sweden work/Dependent Permit (with expiry date)
 



 Do you have CE/DE license
 



  





 Regards
 



  





 Waheeda

title: Senior Android Developer
description:
At Umain, we're not just creating software; we're crafting the future, one innovative project at a time. With our motto "Shape, Ship, Scale," we empower our team to not only envision the future but also play a pivotal role in building it. We're a dynamic team where you can shape the future, ship groundbreaking solutions, and scale your abilities in many different ways.
   

  

 We're on the lookout for developers ready to join us in this journey, bringing passion, creativity, and dedication along with them.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* A chance to work on unique projects that explore and push the boundaries of what's possible.
* A fun and fair work environment where your you have the opportunity to expand your skills through unique challenges and fantastic colleagues.
* A personal coach, and a setting where you can grow professionally and personally.
* Being part of multidisciplinary teams, participating in agile teams, being an important player in a highly ambitious setting.


**As a Senior Android Developer at Umain, your role will involve:**
* Design, build & scale high-performance mobile applications using Jetpack Compose.
* Collaborate and participate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features across both platforms.
* Participating in projects & teams alongside major brands and large organisations, and contributing to emerging tech trends and innovations.
* Drive and lead Android projects. Be able to oversee a team of Android developers, define standards, and manage team deliveries.
* Able to either work closely with, or take part in solving problems on other platforms like iOS, cross-platform and more.
* Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends to ensure our apps are cutting-edge.
* Having a deep understanding of the mobile deployment pipeline.


**Who You Are**
* You're an Android developer (with 10+ years of experience) and a passion for innovation and a knack for problem-solving.
* You're eager to learn, grow, and take on new challenges.
* You value collaboration, diversity, and the opportunity to make a significant impact.
* You believe in the power of technology to shape the future.


**Why Umain?**
* Career Framework:


 We believe in fairness and clarity, which is why we've established a transparent career framework to ensure equal pay and equal opportunities for all. Your growth and success are as important to us as they are to you. Together with your coach, you will build your own development plan and grow in your career.
   

  

* Work-Life Balance:


 At Umain, diversity is our strength. We understand that life doesn’t pause when you walk into the office. That's why we've cultivated an environment that supports an excellent work-life balance. We welcome team members from all walks of life, recognising the richness that different backgrounds, ages, and life stages bring to our team. We're committed to supporting each other, encouraging a healthy work-life balance that respects your needs, whether it's taking care of your family, your pets, or yourself.
   

  

* Innovations and Learning:


 Technology is always evolving, bringing new challenges and opportunities for collaboration and learning. Our developers work closely with designers, analysts, testers and more to tackle these challenges head-on, sharing knowledge and growing together.
   

  

* Skills Over Degrees:


 We’re more interested in what you can do than in the diplomas you hold. Talent, drive, and creativity are what count at Umain. Here, you’ll find opportunities to grow, learn, and excel in your career, regardless of your educational background. If you have the ambition and commitment to succeed, we have the environment and resources to support your journey.
   

  

**Are You Ready to Shape, Ship, and Scale with Us?**
 If you're a developer who thrives on innovation, values a supportive and inclusive workplace, and is eager to make a tangible impact on the future, we’d love to hear from you. Let’s build something awesome together.
   

  

***Background check***
*Umain conducts a background check for final candidates in accordance with our internal People Procedure (UIS‑007). The check is carried out only with your consent and is ordered by our CISO through our approved screening partner. The scope of the check depends on the role level. This step is performed late in the recruitment process and is used solely to support a secure and fact‑based hiring decision.*
 Umain is a digital product consultancy. We shape, ship and scale digital products at speed. Founded in Stockholm in 2001, we are a growing team of 100+ experts in digital product strategy, design, and technology.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Competence Developer Technical Training, Scania Academy
description:
Scania is now undergoing a transformation from being a supplier of trucks, buses and engines to a supplier of complete and sustainable transport solutions.
   

  

 At Scania CV AB we believe that change is essential for growth and innovation. As a leading company in our industry, we are committed to staying ahead of the curve and adapting to evolving market conditions. Our success is driven by our ability to effectively manage change and help our employees and stakeholders embrace new strategies, technologies, and processes.
   

  

**SCANIA ACADEMY
   

  

 In Scania´s journey to become the leader in sustainable transport solutions, Scania Academy supports the business to develop top employees. We enable all employees to perform at their best by providing solutions that increase and secure the right competences, behaviours and attitudes to reach the business targets.**
**Competence Developer Technical Training, Scania Academy**
 Do you have a genuine technical interest and want to influence by developing new learning objects, methods and strengthening the competence of our customers? Then you have an excellent opportunity to join our team.Scania Academy is a trusted partner for the global organisation in competence development. Our mission is to support the organisation in identifying skills needs, offering methods and tools for competence development and strengthen the results.
   

  

 Our mission as a trusted partner to our demanding customers is to support them with efficient training solutions, with high quality and at the right time, to secure the technical competencies needed now and in the future. We know that we are facing several future challenges when it comes to a more complex product, decreased lead time, digital methods and new behaviours. Now you have the opportunity to join us on this journey into the future.
   

  

**The position**
 In the role as a Competence Developer for Technical Training you are, together with our customer, responsible to efficiently develop and deliver technical training solutions for the global network.
   

  

 The learning methods we use are both hands-on training and more digital methods where we deliver technical seminars from our own studio to the network. We are also at the forefront of developing learning methods that include virtual reality.
   

  

 To identify good examples of technical training and to quality assure our own training materials, international travel may be required.
   

  

**Your profile**
 As a person you have a strong mindset with the ability to challenge, innovate and improve processes. You need to have great social skills and the ability to work independently and collaboratively in different teams.
   

  

 In the role you will meet people from many different cultures so it is a an advantage if you have previous cultural experiences.
   

  

 We also believe that you are a practical person with an interest in mechanics and electrical/digital systems.
   

  

 The development in the automotive industry is moving at a rapid pace, so it is essential that you have a driven and determined mindset to be able to evolve with the business.
   

  

 To be able to communicate different learning solutions you need to have strong pedagogical skills. It is a great advantage if you have been a technical trainer or similar.
   

  

 The most important factor to be able to succeed in this role, is however to be curious about new technologies and eager to learn.
   

  

 You are fluent in English , both in speech and in writing. Swedish is not a requirement but it is a merit.
   

  

**Further information**
 For questions please contact Håkan Axelsson, Manager Of Technical Training Development HACD, hakan.axelsson@scania.com
   

  

**Application**
 We look forward to receiving your application, consisting of your CV and kindly ask you not to share a cover letter to ensure an efficient and unbiased recruitment process for all parties.
   

  

 Please apply no later than 2026-03-17.

title: Senior Cybersecurity Method Developer
description:
Swedium Global Services is the growing System Engineering and Solution Company, offers services like Semiconductor Engineering R&D Services, Embedded Systems Development, Custom Application Software Development, Web and Cloud Application Development, Testing Services, Consultancy and Outsourcing services to our clients across the globe for an onsite and offshore business model. Swedium Global is having presence in Sweden, Finland, Poland, Czech Republic and in India.
 



**Location - Onsite,Sweden**




**Job Title - 
 
 Senior Cybersecurity Method Developer** 




 As a Cybersecurity Method Developer, you will work cross functionally in close collaboration with method users (such as testers and developers) as well as tool developers. The role requires a strong technical foundation, deep cybersecurity knowledge, and the ability to define, harmonize, and implement methods across the organization.
 



**Key Responsibilities - Method Definition & Development** 




 • Define cybersecurity methods by collecting experience or conducting deep dive analyses of user needs.
 



 • Develop methods by engaging in discussions with stakeholders and documenting the results clearly and systematically.
 



 • Identify the need for tools and, when necessary, support tool development by defining functional specifications.
 



 Harmonization & Alignment
 



 • Drive harmonization across engineering, quality, and compliance functions.
 



 • Ensure consistent and aligned application of cybersecurity methods across the organization.
 



 Implementation, Training & Support
 



 • Implement methods through teaching, coaching, and effectively "selling" the methods within the organization.
 



 • Maintain, challenge, and continuously improve existing methods and frameworks.
 



  
 



**Required Competence and Experience- Technical Background** 




 • Strong background in software development, preferably in embedded systems, or equivalent technical experience.
 



 Extensive Automotive Cybersecurity Expertise
 



 • ISO/SAE 21434 – Road Vehicles Cybersecurity Engineering
 



 • UN-ECE R155 – Cybersecurity Management Systems (CSMS)
 



 • Threat Analysis and Risk Assessment (TARA)
 



 • Cybersecurity concept development and requirements engineering
 



 • Experience integrating cybersecurity across the full automotive lifecycle:
 



 ○ Development
 



 ○ Production
 



 ○ Post production
 



**Understanding of Risk-Based Management Systems** 




 • ISO 27001 (Information Security Management Systems)
 



 • ISO 9001 (Quality Management Systems)
 



 Considered Strong Advantages
 



 • UN-ECE R156 (Software Update Management Systems)
 



 • ISO 26262 (Functional Safety) and its interface with cybersecurity
 



 • Experience with supplier cybersecurity interfaces (e.g., CS-DIA)
 



 • Experience supporting type approval processes
 



 • Participation in audits or certification assessments
 



**Education** 




 • University degree in a relevant technical field
 



**Personal Profile** 




 To excel in this role, you are someone who sees the broader picture and understands how different components interact while still valuing accuracy and attention to detail. You are genuinely interested in understanding others’ perspectives and needs, which makes you effective in stakeholder collaboration.
 



**You:** 




 • value teamwork and have strong interpersonal and communication skills
 



 • are attentive to details without losing sight of overall goals
 



 • have an analytical mindset combined with pedagogical strengths
 



 • feel comfortable engaging in discussions and guiding others toward best practices
 



 • thrive in an international environment and communicate fluently in English
