title: Data Scientist
description:
**About Snappymob Malaysia**


Snappymob is a boutique technical consultancy specializing in fintech and financial services in Malaysia and APAC. We craft cutting-edge web and mobile solutions that push boundaries, tackling the impossible challenges that others won't even attempt.


Our vibrant team of 100+ innovators from 18 nationalities brings together world-class engineers, QA specialists, and designers. We're obsessed with our craft, thrive on continuous learning, and collaborate to turn ambitious ideas into reality.

 **About the role:**  

We are looking for a strong individual contributor to help us design, build, and deploy practical machine learning solutions in real-world financial environments.  

  

This is not a “build an entire department from scratch” role. You will work closely with experienced engineers and stakeholders to turn well-defined problem statements into reliable, production-ready ML systems.

 **Key Responsibilities**

* Design and develop machine learning models for use cases such as predictive modeling, risk scoring, anomaly detection, and time-series forecasting.
* Translate business problem statements into clear ML approaches and measurable success criteria.
* Perform data exploration, feature engineering, model training, validation, and performance tuning.
* Build and maintain reliable data pipelines for structured and unstructured datasets.
* Deploy models into production environments and support monitoring, evaluation, and continuous improvement.
* Contribute to experimentation with modern AI approaches (including LLMs or RAG systems) where relevant.
* Document assumptions, methodologies, and results to ensure clarity and maintainability.

 **What would you need?**

* Master’s or PhD in a quantitative field such as Data Science, Machine Learning, Computer Science, Statistics, or Applied Mathematics, or equivalent experience.
* Experience applying data science or machine learning models in a financial services, fintech, or capital markets setting.

**Advantage:**

* Familiarity with financial market concepts such as asset classes, risk metrics, portfolio construction, trading strategies, or market microstructure.

**You’re Likely a Great Fit If:**

* You have built and deployed ML models that delivered measurable business outcomes.
* You are comfortable working hands-on with **Python and common ML libraries (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy).**
* You understand the practical trade-offs between model complexity, performance, and maintainability.
* You have experience with model evaluation techniques such as cross-validation or backtesting.
* You are familiar with version control, c**ontainerization (Docker), and basic cloud or MLOps workflows.**
* You can work independently with clear goals, without requiring constant direction.

 **Why join us?**

* **Meaningful Projects:** Work on real-world financial and fintech problems with tangible impact.
* **Employer-Sponsored Work Visa:** Full visa sponsorship for relocation (if applicable).
* **Career Growth:** Mentorship, technical exposure, and continuous learning.
* **Flexible Work Arrangement:** 2 days work-from-home, 3 days in-office, with flexible working hours.
* **Accessible Location:** Office conveniently located near the LRT.
* **Competitive Compensation:** Salary commensurate with experience and capability.

title: Agile Team Manager - VMware Cloud
description:
**Agile Team Manager – VMware Cloud**


**The Department**



Leaseweb Product Engineering team is rapidly growing as we take on exciting new opportunities in regions around the world. The need to have a reliable on-demand, world-class cloud solutions, is paramount for Leaseweb to continue to deliver a large reliable network in the world. To support these ambitions, our Vmware Cloud team is looking for a talented, experienced Agile Team Manager who wants to be part of the beating heart of the internet.


**What is the role about?**



Are you an enthusiastic leader who can keep a team of talented engineers motivated, challenged, and on track? Do you thrive on opportunities to enable others to deliver to their full potential and exceed the expectations of their customers? Are you skilled at working with product owners getting more done and maintaining quality and efficiency? Then, you might want to read further!



The Agile Team Manager is responsible for the overall performance and results of the team, and you coach on the Scrum way of working.


**Key responsibilities:**


* Responsible for developing, coaching and mentoring team members.
* As team manager responsible for performance appraisals.
* Facilitate Scrum events and using agile principles & practices.
* Bring the team to the next maturity level
* Support the team on their workload
* Support the Product Owner and guide business stakeholders.
* Provide transparency and visibility to the entire organization.
* Build a high-performance team, and foster collaboration in and across teams.
* Improve processes in the company impacting the team


**Who are you?**



You are passionate about Agile values, principles and practices. Your style is that of a servant leader and you know how to get a team self-organized. You believe that continuous improvement also applies to yourself, and have the desire to grow as a person and towards being agile. As self-starter, you address issues, remove impediments and coordinate with other departments or customers.


**What we are looking for:**


* Experience as Agile Team Manager/ Scrum Master is a pre-requisite
* PSM I certified
* Broadcom / Vmware knowledge
* Coaching skills
* Facilitation and organization skills.
* Proactive & go getter attitude, team motivator.
* Validating development roadmaps with the business
* Open & transparent.
* Effective communication skills in English, Dutch is a plus


You will maintain a technical focus with applicable knowledge of the technologies used by the team and be willing to have technical involvement to support the team getting the job done.


**Benefits include:**



The salary for this position ranges from 63.000 Euros to 82.000 Euros annually (including the holiday allowance), depending on your experience and skills. We also take internal equity into account to ensure fair and consistent compensation across our team. Next to salary, we offer the following benefits:


* Participation in annual company bonus scheme and company pension
* Internet allowance and travel allowance
* Working from home policy
* Lease bike plan
* 25 days of paid time off (and the option to buy or sell up to 5 more days)
* Free lunch, parking, and fresh fruit provided when in the office
* Attractive relocation packages and an agency that takes care of the entire visa process
* Access to the Leaseweb Academy, a personalized learning platform offering a variety of studies, (Dutch) courses, and trainings
* Fun events year-round – from virtual pub quizzes to summer parties, company runs, quarterly hackathons and much more
* Monthly after work drinks
* A multicultural work environment (our colleagues are from over 60 countries!) in a company where you can truly make a difference

**Ready for the next step?**


If you’d like to apply, please do so online. To learn more about us, follow us on LinkedIn or Instagram to get an inside look at life at Leaseweb. For questions, please reach out to Merve Bulazar, Talent Acquisition Specialist, at: m.bulazar@global.leaseweb.com


***We directly source all candidates – any unsolicited profiles received from recruitment agencies will be treated as direct applications.***

title: Storage Engineer - Cloud Storage Team
description:
**Storage Engineer**


*Our office is based in Amsterdam, but remote work within the EU is available.*



Leaseweb is currently looking for a highly motivated Storage Engineer to join our Cloud Storage team in Amsterdam. The Leaseweb Cloud Storage team delivers cloud storage solutions such as block storage, file storage and object storage. These solutions are based on NetApp technology. We are looking for an experienced Storage engineer who can help us support the storage environment.



Many companies simply consume cloud storage. Here at Leaseweb, we ARE the cloud. Are you interested in building and maintaining a hyper-scaler to compete with the big boys in the industry? Do you want to contribute to a true Sovereign European Cloud?


**What is the role about?**



As a Storage Engineer in the Cloud Storage team, you will help us by supporting with incidents and keeping the storage up to date. You will do this in a multidisciplinary dev-ops team, striving for trust, autonomy, and full ownership of its services. Together with other Storage Engineers and Software Engineers, you will be responsible for day to day management. This involves choosing what hardware to run on, how redundant everything is, what kind of automation to build, how to monitor up-time and performance, and much more. You’ll have influence over the entire customer journey from beginning to end. Your actions will have a major impact, and you will also clearly see the result of your work.


**Key responsibilities :**


* Research new technologies and build new products.
* Collaborate with other departments and vendors to deliver new services to our customers.
* Support our sales team in understanding customers' needs and defining the best solutions.
* Care for our customers and build sustainable long-term relationships with them.
* Make sure our services are monitored and always up and running.
* Be the 3rd support level, sometimes on-call, and solve those problems no one else could.


**What we’re looking for:**

* Knowledge of storage products, preferably NetApp.
* Knowledge of protocols such as NFS, iSCSI, CIFS, S3.
* Additional knowledge about the products we use is a plus:
* + Ceph storage
	+ Microsoft products (AD, DNS, and Servers).
	+ Linux (CentOS, Ubuntu, Debian).
	+ Datacenter networking.
* Experience with automation tools/scripting is also a plus:
* + PowerShell
	+ Other scripting languages like e.g. Python, Perl, or Bash (Although you will have work with Software Engineers who will develop automation in PHP)
	+ Chef or Ansible (We use Chef)
* Strong team player, able to be part and support a culture of trust, autonomy, and collaboration.
* Self-motivated and driven by the will to provide excellent services to our customers.
* Good command of written and spoken English (Dutch would be an advantage)


Do you have experience building storage environments? Are you interested in taking those skills to the next level? We’d love to talk to you!


**You don’t check all the boxes?**  

The lists above are about the technologies that we use, and it would be great if we find someone who ticks all the boxes. There aren’t many people who are experienced with everything we use. Is managing storage equipment on a datacenter scale something you’re interested in, but not quite within your skillset yet? If you have some system administration skills and are willing to learn, we are willing to teach!For this job specifically, we only require storage experience.


**Benefits include**



The salary for this position ranges from 58.000 Euros to 70.000 Euros annually (including the holiday allowance), depending on your experience and skills. The final offer is determined based on the candidate’s experience, skills, and qualifications, as well as how the offer aligns with internal equity and our established salary framework.



Next to salary, we offer the following benefits:


* Participation in annual company bonus scheme and company pension
* Internet allowance
* Working from home policy
* Work from abroad: Up to 4 weeks per year, following policy guidelines
* Lease bike plan
* 25 days of paid time off (and the option to buy or sell up to 5 more days)
* Free lunch, parking, and fresh fruit provided when in the office
* Access to the Leaseweb Academy, a personalized learning platform offering a variety of studies, (Dutch) courses, and trainings
* Fun events year-round – from virtual pub quizzes to summer parties, company runs, quarterly hackathons and much more
* A multicultural work environment (our colleagues are from over 60 countries!) in a company where you can truly make a difference


**Ready for the next step?**


If you’d like to apply, please do so online. To learn more about us, follow us on LinkedIn or Instagram to get an inside look at life at Leaseweb. For questions, please reach out to Merve Bulazar, Talent Acquisition Specialist, at: m.bulazar@global.leaseweb.com.


***We directly source all candidates – any unsolicited profiles received from recruitment agencies will be treated as direct applications.***

title: ESB System Expert
description:
**Join our Team**
-----------------


**About this Opportunity :**


We are looking for a Senior Integration Engineer to maintain our high-traffic integration backbone. You will be responsible for a diverse environment that spans from TIBCO’s enterprise-grade messaging to Node.js microservices running on OpenShift.  

Your responsibility is to ensure that data flows seamlessly across the organization, whether it’s through a traditional MFT process, a Kafka stream, or a GraphQL endpoint.

**What you will do :**


Support the following systems and functions:

* Hybrid Integration Management: Develop and support complex integration patterns using both TIBCO BWCE/BW6 and Node.js microservices.
* API Ecosystem Ownership: Manage our API surface area using TIBCO Mashery, ensuring secure, throttled, and well-documented access for internal and external consumers.
* Cloud-Native Operations: Deploy, scale, and monitor services within Kubernetes and OpenShift environments, utilizing Docker for consistent delivery.
* Data Stream Orchestration: Build and maintain high-throughput, event-driven architectures using Kafka for real-time system synchronization.
* Secure File Transfer: Manage enterprise-level secure data exchanges using TIBCO MFT, ensuring compliance and reliability.
* Full-Stack Observability: Use the ELK Stack to create dashboards, alerts, and tracing for proactive system health management.
* Automated Delivery: Maintain and enhance CI/CD pipelines to ensure code moves from CLI to production with zero manual intervention.
* Coordination with IT/network teams to resolve any operational or functional issues.
* Deploy CRs on production environments and ensure smooth system performance.
* Follow ITIL processes and exhibit expertise in incident, problem and change management.
* Ensure SLA compliance for application and trouble tickets.
* Coordinating with project teams, vendors, and business teams during the incidents.

**What you will bring :**

* Education: BSc in Telecommunications, Computer Science or equivalent.
* 8-12 years of relevant experience in TIBCO container edition products.
* The TIBCO Suite: Deep expertise in BWCE, BW6, Mashery, and MFT.
* Container Orchestration: Advanced hands-on experience with Kubernetes and OpenShift.
* Development: Proficiency in Node.js for building lightweight, scalable microservices.
* Messaging & APIs: Expertise in Kafka (pub/sub) and GraphQL (schema design and implementation).
* Systems Skills: Expert-level CLI skills (Linux/Unix shell) and a strong grasp of Docker networking/volumes.
* Monitoring: Experience configuring ELK (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) for distributed tracing.
* Analytical and communication skills to understand the requirements of the customer.
* Good understanding on the concepts of SOA, ESB and API driven integrations.
* Knowledge of SSL certificates and configuration in TIBCO environment.
* Strong debugging skills and problem-solving approach.
**Why join Ericsson?**At Ericsson, you´ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what´s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems. You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. You´ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.  

  

**What happens once you apply?**Click Here to find all you need to know about what our typical hiring process looks like.Encouraging a diverse and inclusive organization is core to our values at Ericsson, that's why we champion it in everything we do. We truly believe that by collaborating with people with different experiences we drive innovation, which is essential for our future growth. We encourage people from all backgrounds to apply and realize their full potential as part of our Ericsson team. Ericsson is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. learn more.

 **Primary country and city:** United Arab Emirates (AE) || Dubai

**Req ID:** 780536

* Cloud-Native Operations: Deploy, scale, and monitor services within Kubernetes and OpenShift environments, utilizing Docker for consistent delivery.
* Data Stream Orchestration: Build and maintain high-throughput, event-driven architectures using Kafka for real-time system synchronization.
* Secure File Transfer: Manage enterprise-level secure data exchanges using TIBCO MFT, ensuring compliance and reliability.
* Full-Stack Observability: Use the ELK Stack to create dashboards, alerts, and tracing for proactive system health management.
* Automated Delivery: Maintain and enhance CI/CD pipelines to ensure code moves from CLI to production with zero manual intervention.
* Coordination with IT/network teams to resolve any operational or functional issues.
* Deploy CRs on production environments and ensure smooth system performance.
* Follow ITIL processes and exhibit expertise in incident, problem and change management.
* Ensure SLA compliance for application and trouble tickets.
* Coordinating with project teams, vendors, and business teams during the incidents.

**What you will bring :**

* Education: BSc in Telecommunications, Computer Science or equivalent.
* 8-12 years of relevant experience in TIBCO container edition products.
* The TIBCO Suite: Deep expertise in BWCE, BW6, Mashery, and MFT.
* Container Orchestration: Advanced hands-on experience with Kubernetes and OpenShift.
* Development: Proficiency in Node.js for building lightweight, scalable microservices.
* Messaging & APIs: Expertise in Kafka (pub/sub) and GraphQL (schema design and implementation).
* Systems Skills: Expert-level CLI skills (Linux/Unix shell) and a strong grasp of Docker networking/volumes.
* Monitoring: Experience configuring ELK (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) for distributed tracing.
* Analytical and communication skills to understand the requirements of the customer.
* Good understanding on the concepts of SOA, ESB and API driven integrations.
* Knowledge of SSL certificates and configuration in TIBCO environment.
* Strong debugging skills and problem-solving approach.

title: Team Manager – Cloud Foundation | SEB, Solna
description:
SEB is not just a financial institution; we are a technology leader in the Nordic region, navigating a massive transformation journey within the banking industry with AI and Cloud outlining an exciting future. At SEB, Cloud is now the backbone of our future banking. Within the Cloud Foundation department, we are building the Cloud platforms that are the foundation of the bank, empower our developers and secure our customers' future.
   

  

**About The Job**
 We are a team of dedicated experts who believe that great platforms are the foundation of innovation, speed and security. We are now looking for a Technology Specialist Manager who can lead our senior engineers and developers with empathy and technical depth. You will be the leader of two of our most critical and high-impact areas: Azure and AWS managed platforms and the SaaS Integrator team.
   

  

 In this role, you won't just manage people; you will be the guardian of our delivery quality, our collaboration and the coach who helps our talent grow in one of the most complex environments in the industry. In our agile setup, we lead through a collaborative "Triangle" consisting of the Product Owner (PO), the Solution Architect (SA), and you – the Team Manager.
   

  

 We are looking for a seasoned leader who understands that technical excellence and human empowerment go hand in hand. This is a role for a leader who values impact over prestige, and technical depth over micromanagement.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
* Lead the Azure & AWS Core team, which is the engine behind two of our Cloud platforms providing automated, secure, and pre-vetted environments using Infrastructure as Code and Landing zone Vending machines.
* Lead the SaaS Integrator team, advising, onboarding, and supporting SaaS integrations throughout the bank to ensure every integration is resilient and efficient through architectural reviews, Business Continuity Management, and exit planning.
* Act as the owner of the "Who," the Quality, and the Compliance within the leadership Triangle, while the Product Owner prioritizes the When, and the Solution Architect defines the architectural How.
* Hold ultimate accountability for the entire delivery, ensuring that our resources, skills, and operational stability meet the highest standards.
* Act as the bridge to our IT strategy, participating in complex discussions to ensure alignment between technical requirements, regulatory frameworks, and business speed.


**Requirements & Skills**
* Experienced leader: You have at least 5-10 years of experience leading development teams within Cloud development and/or platform engineering.
* Cloud native: You have documented competence in cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP) and a deep understanding of what it means to build and evolve a Cloud platform at scale, preferably within a regulated business.
* Strategic & Independent: You can independently support your teams in establishing their deliveries through navigating the complexities of a large-scale organization.
* Communicator & Negotiator: You are comfortable driving high-stakes discussions regarding technical governance and regulatory compliance, ensuring all stakeholders are aligned on expectations, quality and risk.
* The Leaders mentality: You value collaboration and consensus. You lead through facilitation and coaching rather than command and control.


**What We Offer**
* A work environment where equality and professional growth are prioritized.
* The chance to work with highly skilled developers and a high-tech stack including Azure, AWS, and SaaS governance expertise.
* A culture that values sustainable work-life balance and the long-term well-being of our team members.
* Direct impact on the future IT of one of the Nordics' most influential banks.


**Ready to join?**
 Welcome to our inclusive culture, where our shared values inspire and uplift our team. We strive to ensure that every employee feels seen, heard and valued.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today, but no later than 13-03-2026. If you have questions about the position, please contact Talent Acquisition Partner Linn Odén at linn.oden@seb.se

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
 Kreditz is looking for a
 **DevOps Engineer** 
 to join our Tech team. In this role, you will build and evolve our cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and platform tooling, ensuring our systems are scalable, reliable, and secure as we grow.
   

  

 This is a hands-on builder role for someone who enjoys automation, ownership, and turning complexity into clean, scalable infrastructure.
   

  

**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**Some Of The Main Responsibilities You Will Cover**
* Design, build, and maintain cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Develop and optimize CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment.
* Build and deploy services on AWS using ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Implement and maintain monitoring, alerting, and observability solutions.
* Collaborate with developers to improve deployment workflows and platform reliability.
* Work with serverless technologies (Lambda) for event processing and automation.
* Perform code reviews and contribute hands-on to infrastructure projects.
* Leverage AI agents and tools to enhance development workflows and productivity.
* Document infrastructure architecture, processes, and runbooks.


 Success means engineers ship confidently, systems scale without drama, and incidents are rare, visible, and quickly resolved.
   

  

**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
**We Believe That You Have**
* A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* 5+ years of experience in DevOps, platform engineering, or backend development.
* Strong skills in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Experience with AWS services, particularly ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Experience with CI/CD tools and pipeline automation.
* Familiarity with containerization (Docker/Podman).
* Familiarity with message queuing (SQS, SNS).
* Experience with databases like PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, DynamoDB.
* Strong skills in monitoring and observability tools (CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, X-Ray).
* Proficiency with Git and version control workflows.
* Scripting skills in Python, Bash, or Go.
* Excellent English communication skills (Swedish is a plus).
* Enthusiasm for using AI agents and tools in daily development work.
* Experience in FinTech is a plus.


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, you'll have the opportunity to work in a cutting-edge, fast-growing FinTech company that's redefining the credit scoring industry. With the backing of major investors and a clear vision for the future, your work will make a real impact on financial inclusion worldwide. Join us and be a part of something truly transformative!
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q1/Q2 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s VP Engineering
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March 2026*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our Co-founder/CTO, arlen@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology

title: Solution Architect D365
description:
**Position:** 
 Solution Architect D365
 



**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden (hybrid)
 



  





*Wipro Limited is a leading global information technology, consulting and business process services company. We harness the power of cognitive computing, hyper-automation, robotics, cloud, analytics and emerging technologies to help our clients adapt to the digital world and make them successful. A company recognized globally for its comprehensive portfolio of services, strong commitment to sustainability and good corporate citizenship, we have over 240,000 dedicated employees serving clients across six continents. Together, we discover ideas and connect the dots to build a better and a bold new future.* 




  





 This role belongs to our Nordics subsidiary with a headquarter in Stockholm.
 



  





 We provide Application support and development services to our customer. The services include coordination with other suppliers as well as making code/configuration changes. The project requires handling of Major as well as minor applications issues. We are looking for resources who have strong technical skills but also good at learning functional skills too.
 



  





**Must Have:** 



* Min 10 Years of experience in IT out of those 5 years as Solution Architect,
* D365 (P) , Project Operation ,
* Powerapps, Dataverse , Power Automate flows



  





**Roles and Responsibilities:** 



* Define
 **end‑to‑end solution architecture** 
 for Dynamics 365 (Customer Engagement / Project Operations) and Power Platform solutions.
* Design scalable, secure, and performant architectures aligned to business requirements.
* Own
 **system design, interface design, and integration architecture** 
 across D365, Dataverse, Azure, and third‑party systems.
* Lead application design reviews, including improvements and enhancements.
* Ensure strict adherence to design best practices, covering: Data integrity ,Security & compliance ,Performance optimization ,Usability and intuitiveness
* Proactively identify
 **technical risks** 
 and define mitigation strategies.
* Drive
 **performance improvement initiatives** 
 across D365 and Power Platform solutions.
* Manage and assess the architectural impact of
 **scope changes and change requests** 
 .



  





**Good to Have:** 




  




* Azure Integration



  





*Applications from people with disabilities with appropriate suitability are explicitly welcome.* 




*At Wipro, we endeavor to provide a formidable platform for professionals who will be our change agents – catalysts who are torchbearers of our fortitude to excel and redefine the limits of technology to make our clients successful. Our hiring team focuses on the recruitment of talented professionals in the industry. If you are experienced in the pursuit of excellence in IT, and looking for challenging opportunities to actualize your fire within, look no further. A career at Wipro offers just that and a lot more.*

title: Data Trainee
description:
**Vill du vara med och bygga framtidens dataplattform?**
 Vi letar efter vår nästa Data Trainee. Under ett år kliver du rakt in i hjärtat av Eidra, ett konsultbolag med 1400 specialister i 16 bolag, för att utveckla och förvalta vår interna dataplattform. Det här är inte en "sitta på bänken"-roll. Du kommer jobba nära vårt regionala och globala ledarskap, driva interna analysprojekt och se till att våra insikter faktiskt landar i affärsbeslut.
   

  

 Efter året som trainee tar du klivet över till Curamando, Eidras bolag med fokus på Data och AI, som konsult, redo att möta våra största klienter med en verktygslåda i världsklass.
   

  

**Varför detta traineeprogram?**
 Du får utforska hela datalivscykeln end-to-end. Från rå data-integration till färdiga dashboards som styr vår globala verksamhet. Du kommer att arbeta i en modern stack där du genom praktiskt arbete får lära dig Google Cloud Platform (GCP), dbt, Terraform, GitHub, Airflow och Power BI, både operativt och från ett arkitekturperspektiv.
   

  

 Vi tror på kraften i att ses, och du kommer utgå från vårt nybyggda kontor på Grev Tureplan 1 i centrala Stockholm. Här jobbar du sida vid sida med några av branschens vassaste konsulter som guidar dig genom både teknik och konsten att driva projekt och hantera stakeholders. Tjänsten är en betald heltidsanställning (100%) där du får möjlighet att växa in i konsultrollen.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Du tar din examen under sommaren 2026, alternativt har du arbetat något år efter studierna. Vi ser gärna att du har en master inom Industriell ekonomi, Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Data Engineering eller liknande.
   

  

**Dina Styrkor**
* Python, du har goda kunskaper och gillar att bygga smarta lösningar
* SQL, du har koll på grunderna, men du behöver inte vara en expert än
* Power BI, du behöver inte ha arbetet med verktyget innan, men du är nyfiken på visualisering och datamodellering
* Affärsdriv, du är nyfiken på hur ett globalt konsultbolag styrs och växer
* Kommunikation, du pratar och skriver obehindrat på svenska och trivs i en snabbrörlig miljö där du får ett stort eget ansvar


**Vad du får lära dig**
* Modern Data Stack, handgriplig erfarenhet av GCP, dbt, Terraform och Airflow
* End-to-end BI, från rådata i molnet till affärskritiska rapporter i Power BI
* Stakeholder Management, konsten att presentera insikter för ett globalt ledarskap
* Konsultrollen, hur man använder teknisk expertis för att skapa affärsvärde


**Processen**
 Vi ser rekryteringen som en ömsesidig resa för att lära känna varandra, dina mål och dina drivkrafter.
   

  

* Introduktion, vi pratar värderingar och dina karriärmål
* Tekniskt djupdykning, vi fokuserar på din kunskap inom Python och ditt logiska tänkande
* Case, visa oss hur du tar dig an ett problem och omvandlar det till en lösning
* Team meet and greet, träffa gänget och känn på atmosfären på kontoret


**Är du redo att kickstarta din karriär på riktigt?** 
 Vi söker dig som vill lära dig de senaste teknikerna och växa in i rollen som framtidens toppkonsult. Vi rekryterar löpande, så vänta inte med din ansökan!
   

  

 Eidra is a carefully selected group of specialist companies. Different in craft but united in the ambition to solve our clients’ problems and create lasting value. We are 1200 people across different markets. All are passionate about change.

title: Solution Architect – Datacenter & Hybrid Cloud
description:
Beskrivning av tjänsten
   

  

**Vill du ta tekniskt helhetsansvar i affärskritiska upphandlingar inom datacenter och hybrid cloud?**
 Hos CGI arbetar du som Solution Architect nära affären med att designa, kostnadssätta och presentera lösningar för verksamhetskritiska kunder med höga krav på tillgänglighet, säkerhet och stabil drift.
   

  

 Om rollen
   

  

 Du har en central roll i CGI:s bid och affärsteam och ansvarar för den tekniska helheten i anbud och större kunddialoger. Arbetet omfattar arkitektur, lösningsdesign och kommersiella underlag inom datacenter och hybrid cloud, i nära samarbete med säljare, projektledare och tekniska specialister.
   

  

**Placeringsort är flexibel – exempelvis Mälardalen, Göteborgsområdet eller Skåne.**
 Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Ta fram arkitektur och lösningsförslag inom datacenter och hybrid cloud
* Delta i och driva tekniska delar av upphandlingar (RFP/RFI/RFQ)
* Säkerställa teknisk helhet, risker, antaganden och beroenden
* Arbeta med estimat, kalkyler och offerter
* Presentera och försvara lösningar i dialog med kund


**Teknikområden**
 Datacenter och infrastruktur (virtualisering, storage, backup), HA/DR, hybrid cloud, publika moln (Azure, AWS, GCP) samt säkerhet och driftsäkerhet i verksamhetskritiska miljöer.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll
   

  

 Du har flera års erfarenhet från roller som Solution Architect, teknisk presales, teknisk KAM eller motsvarande, med ansvar för lösningsframtagning i affärsnära sammanhang. Du har arbetat med upphandlingar och anbud och har en stabil teknisk grund inom datacenter och hybrida molnlösningar. Du är van att arbeta med komplexa kravbilder och att kommunicera lösningar tydligt i dialog med både kund och interna intressenter, på svenska och engelska.
   

  

**Meriterande:** 
 erfarenhet av managed services, containerplattformar/plattformsdrift samt relevant akademisk examen.
   

  

**Därför CGI**
* Affärsnära och strategisk roll med tydlig påverkan
* Arbete med komplexa och verksamhetskritiska uppdrag
* Erfaret och prestigelöst team
* Tydliga utvecklingsvägar
* Delägarskap – du blir CGI Partner


**Ansökan**
 Vi arbetar med löpande urval.
   

  

 Frågor? Kontakta Daniel Kommes, Director Consulting Delivery
   

  

 daniel.kommes@cgi.com
   

  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**
 Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.
   

  

 Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.
   

  

 Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
   

  

 Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.

title: Creative Solutions Engineer (Full-stack Engineer)
description:
At Precis, we are a group of friendly experts in media buying, analytics & marketing science, creative, and technology with a joint mission to help great companies thrive in the digital landscape.
   

  

 As a
 **Creative Solutions Engineer (Full-stack Engineer - Cloud-native, GCP)** 
 at Precis, you will work hands-on with building and maintaining cloud-native systems that enable scalable, automated, and forward-looking creative technology solutions. You will design and implement backend services, data pipelines, and full-stack applications that support experimentation, innovation, and production-grade systems — always with a focus on scalability, security, and maintainability.
   

  

 This role sits within our Creative Tech department, working at the intersection of software engineering, cloud infrastructure, and creative problem-solving. You will build technical systems and platforms that are shaped by how creative work is produced, scaled, and evolved — requiring both strong engineering fundamentals and an understanding of creative workflows, constraints, and opportunities.
   

  

 The focus is on building flexible, future-proof solutions that enable experimentation and new ways of working, rather than optimizing for a single format or existing workflow.
   

  

 We are looking for an intermediate engineer who enjoys shipping real systems, learning through doing, and contributing to technical discussions around architecture and tooling.
   

  

 We are committed to building an inclusive and fair workplace that attracts talent and advances its people, regardless of their background, experiences, or perspectives. We believe that a diverse set of minds contributes to our innovative culture and our ability to constantly evolve.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing 💼**
**Engineering & Platform Development**
* Design, build, and maintain backend services, APIs, and data pipelines using TypeScript and Node.js.
* Build and maintain full-stack solutions, including user interfaces using React and Next.js.
* Develop and operate cloud-native solutions on Google Cloud Platform, working with services such as Cloud Run, Firebase, and other common GCP components.
* Contribute to internal platforms and tooling that enable large-scale creative production, automation, and custom workflows.
* Ensure solutions are built with strong fundamentals around architecture, security, scalability, and reliability.
* Work with Git as part of a collaborative development workflow, including code reviews and shared ownership of codebases.
* Participate in documentation and knowledge sharing to support long-term maintainability of systems.


**Solution Design, Automation & Innovation**
* Translate creative and operational needs into robust technical solutions.
* Help design and evolve systems that support creative automation, with a strong focus on exploring and applying AI in thoughtful, production-grade ways where it creates real value.
* Collaborate closely with other engineers, creative technologists, and stakeholders within Creative, such as designers and strategists.
* Continuously improve existing systems through iteration, refactoring, and technical curiosity.


**What We Are Looking For ✔️**
* Professional experience as a software engineer at an intermediate level.
* Strong fundamentals in TypeScript and backend development using Node.js.
* Experience building and maintaining full-stack applications, including frontend development with React and Next.js.
* Experience building and operating backend services, APIs, and/or data pipelines in production.
* Experience working with Google Cloud Platform.
* A solid understanding of cloud-native architecture, security basics, and system design.
* Experience working with Git in a team-based development environment.
* Ability to work independently on tasks while collaborating effectively with others.


**Nice-to-have**
* Experience with Python.
* Experience working with Figma, including building or supporting plugins and workflows.
* Experience with ExtendScript or development for creative tools such as After Effects.
* Experience with JavaScript bundlers such as Webpack, Esbuild, or similar tools.
* Familiarity with node-based automation systems such as n8n.
* Exposure to automation systems, AI-enabled solutions, or large-scale production pipelines.
* Interest in creative technology, digital advertising, or understanding what makes effective creative.


**What We Offer🌟**
*You can read our full offering in our* 
*handbook* 
*.*
* An intense learning environment where you will be able to grow and develop your skills and passions alongside some of the brightest minds in the industry.
* A culture that is built on collaboration, trust and innovation. We value having fun together - that’s why we also have regular afterworks, team events and a yearly festival.
* Transparent salary setting, you can find all our salary bands in our handbook. This role is a L2 role within the Creative Tech column.
* 30 days paid leave, flexible public holidays, parental pay, a solid pension scheme and key insurance. Our different offices also offer different perks such as massage, health care contributions, free book orders, healthy snacks & great coffee, EAP programs and your choice of PC or Mac.
* A diverse environment with a high focus on inclusion and belonging. We speak 46 native languages around Precis, and our internal inclusion score is 4.5 out of 5.


**We update all candidates on their applications by email. If you don't receive an email from us, please check your spam folder.**

title: Technical Support Specialist
description:
Driven by the belief that shopping should be simple and seamless, we help global fashion and lifestyle retailers by fulfilling our mission to create positive shopping experiences — every time, everywhere.
 



  





 Our vision is to empower retailers with the world’s leading Unified Commerce Platform and Point of Sale, removing the barriers between e-commerce, online marketplaces, and brick-and-mortar stores to support new shopping behaviors.
 



 We’re a fast-growing Swedish tech company trusted by global retailers in more than 20 countries — a number that keeps growing — and we have no intention of stopping anytime soon. As a member of our team, you’ll have the opportunity to influence the future of retail. Are you one of the four Technical Support Specialists we’re looking for?
 



  





**Your mission at Sitoo** 




  





 Our Technical Support Specialists are the
 **front-line faces** 
 of our Customer Care, responsible for delivering an exceptional and smooth support experience to our Nordic and global retailers. You are key to ensuring the "shopping flowfulness" of our clients by providing expert guidance, troubleshooting, and support for the Sitoo solutions.
 



  





**What you will do** 




  




* Be the first point of contact for Sitoo's Nordic and global customers via phone, email, and chat (Swedish and English).
* Provide expert support, guiding, and troubleshooting for the POS (iOS/Android) and related back-office operations.
* Support customers with technical issues related to POS hardware integrations (printers, scanners, payment terminals) and basic IT/network configuration.
* Log, prioritize, and manage support tickets (cases) efficiently, ensuring clear and accurate documentation of all reported issues and resolutions.
* Proactively gather information and reproduce issues to effectively resolve problems on the first contact (first-call resolution).
* Collaborate closely with Second Line Support, Product, and Development teams to escalate complex, unresolved technical incidents while maintaining ownership of customer communication.
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of the Customer Care knowledge base by identifying, updating, and creating new support articles and internal guides.
* Embrace the Sitoo values, acting as a friendly, solution-oriented partner to our customers, driving the mission to create positive shopping experiences, every time and everywhere.



  





**What you’ll bring to the table** 




  




* Fluent communication skills in both Swedish and English (written and verbal).
* Proven experience in a technical support, service desk, or customer-facing IT role.
* Basic working knowledge of IT infrastructure, mobile applications (iOS/Android), and network troubleshooting.
* Demonstrated ability to technically troubleshoot software/hardware issues and efficiently manage a queue of support tickets.
* A naturally service-minded, patient, and pedagogical approach to guiding users through complex technical steps.
* Well-structured, organized, with great attention to detail and documentation.
* Experience supporting SaaS solutions, preferably in a B2B environment, is a plus.



  





**Why Sitoo** 




  





 We dare to dream big, we have the courage to keep raising the bar, and we’re committed to being a force for good in retail. We believe in an inclusive culture where everyone feels a sense of belonging. We support each other, we win together, we celebrate success together, and we overcome challenges together.
 



  





 Today, we’re more than 100 dedicated experts with a positive and solution-oriented mindset. Most importantly, we take care of each other, and we never forget to have fun.

title: AI Engineer
description:
*At* 
***Norrin***
*, we’re shaping the era of Enterprise Intelligence. Our vision is to transform business productivity through data & AI by creating solutions that deliver measurable impact. As a Microsoft technology partner, we are at the forefront of reshaping how businesses operate across the Nordics. What defines us is deep technical expertise, a creative engineering mindset, and a people-first culture. You’ll have the chance to grow in a direction that matters to you while building solutions that make a real difference. With a strong presence in Finland and growing operations in Sweden, the United States, Thailand and Vietnam, we continue to expand our Nordic roots internationally. Most recently, Swedish company* 
***BizOne***
*joined the Norrin Group, further strengthening our presence across the Nordics.*
 We’re looking for
 **AI Engineers** 
 to join our growing team in Stockholm. In this role, you’ll work directly with customers to design, build, and deploy AI-powered solutions that solve real business problems. You’ll combine broad engineering capability with hands-on delivery, moving fast from idea to working prototypes to production-ready value. This role is about creative engineering, co-creation with users, and shaping how enterprises adopt AI in practice.
   

  

 You will also be part of Norrin’s AI Guild, a community where knowledge is shared, skills are developed together, and people actively support each other’s growth.
   

  

**🧩 In This Role, You Will Be**
* Working closely with customers to understand their problems and rapidly design practical AI solutions
* Implementing end-to-end AI/ML workflows, from agents and RAG setups to traditional ML where needed
* Building and deploying cloud-native applications, preferably on Azure
* Applying modern software engineering practices (Git, CI/CD, quality-oriented development)
* Using MLOps approaches to operationalize models, monitor them, and ensure they deliver value
* Integrating with APIs and enterprise systems (REST, events, custom interfaces)
* Working with databases, SQL, and pragmatic data engineering where required
* Navigating between solution shaping, hands-on implementation, and light advisory, depending on the customer phase


**🌱Why Norrin?**
* People-first culture: A workplace where you can be yourself. Our culture is built on openness, equality, and mutual respect
* Flexible working model: Our hybrid model offers the best of both worlds, flexibility in your daily life and in-person collaboration when it moves things forward
* Fair compensation: A competitive salary that reflects your skills and experience
* Grow with us: We encourage continuous learning and development in a direction that matters to you


 ✨
 **What we value**
* 4+ years of experience in software or data applications, ideally with hands-on AI/ML components
* Experience with AI agents and large language models (LLMs)
* Strong cloud development background (Azure preferred)
* Strong skills in Python and modern engineering practices (Git, CI/CD, testing mindset)
* Experience with deploying and operating ML systems in production
* Solid understanding of APIs, integrations, databases, and SQL
* Ability to frame problems, design pragmatic solutions, and work directly with end-users
* Strong English and Swedish skills (written & spoken)
* Educational background in computer science, applied mathematics, engineering, or similar


**➕ What’s a Plus (but Not Required)**
* Experience with IaC and containerization (Terraform, Docker)
* Familiarity with PyTorch, LangChain/LlamaIndex, deep learning, and LLM evaluation frameworks
* Experience working with data platforms (Databricks, Microsoft Fabric, event streams, data warehouses)
* Background in structured testing approaches to ensure robustness
* Prior consulting or customer-facing engineering experience
* Prior leadership or consulting experience, with the ability to guide teams and advise stakeholders


 📩
 **Your next opportunity might start here**
 We’re excited to hear from you! Applications are reviewed continuously, and we’ll move forward as soon as we find the right person. Could it be you?

title: Commercial Solution Engineer
description:
Snowflake is about empowering enterprises to achieve their full potential — and people too. With a culture that’s all in on impact, innovation, and collaboration, Snowflake is the sweet spot for building big, moving fast, and taking technology — and careers — to the next level.
   

  

 We are looking for a
 **Commercial Solution Engineer** 
 for the Spanish market who can solve our customer’s most complex problems. In this role you will work directly with the account sales team and channel partners to understand the needs of our customers, strategize on how to best support them in their evaluation and ultimately help our customers choose Snowflake as their solution.
   

  

 As a Snowflake Commercial Solution Engineer you share our passion for solving complex data challenges and helping organizations to get the most out of their data assets. Our technical landscape is ever evolving and you are keen to learn new skills and put them into practice on real world challenges. You are able to translate features and functions into solutions that solve business problems, in conversations with technical or business teams, with end users or executives.
   

  

 In this role you will get to:
   

  

* Present Snowflake’s technology and vision to executives and technical contributors at prospects and customers
* Work hands-on with prospects and customers to demonstrate and communicate the value of Snowflake technology throughout the sales cycle, from demo to proof of concept to design and implementation
* Create and develop technical champions in your accounts to drive deals and achieve a technical win
* Be at the cutting edge of Snowflake technology and confidently present Snowflake roadmap features and functionality to customers and/or prospects
* Immerse and enable yourself in the ever-evolving industry, maintaining a deep understanding of competitive and complementary technologies and vendors and how to position Snowflake in relation to them
* Work closely with other sales engineers to make each other the best and constantly learn from wins and losses
* Collaborate with Product Management, Engineering, and Marketing to continuously improve Snowflake’s products and marketing
* Represent Snowflake at industry or customer events
* Work with our ecosystem and implementation partners to build joint architectures or collaborate on account strategies and initiatives to help our customers be successful


 On day one we will expect you to have:
   

  

* Sales engineering/solution architect experience in a SaaS environment or relevant industry experience (analytics, data science, data engineering etc)
* Outstanding presentation skills to both technical and executive audiences, whether impromptu on a whiteboard or using presentations and demos
* Understanding of and experience with data architecture, data analytics and cloud technology
* Hands on experience with SQL
* Ability to solve customer specific business problems and apply Snowflake’s solutions
* Customer-facing skills to effectively communicate our vision to a wide variety of technical and executive audiences both written and verbal


 Preferred (but not required) to have:
   

  

* Hands on experience with Python
* Experience working with modern data technology (e.g. dbt, spark, containers, devops tooling, orchestration tools, git, etc.)
* Experience with data science and machine learning technology


 People want to buy from people who understand them. Our Solution Engineers build connections, relationships and trust with our customers that last. We love to learn, are open to giving and receiving feedback and are passionate about making our customers and each other successful.
   

  

 Think you have what it takes but not sure that you tick every box above? Apply anyways! We value the broad range of experience our teams bring to the table and believe our customers are more successful because of it.
   

  

 Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.
   

  

 How do you want to make your impact?
   

  

 For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com

title: IT Workplace Engineer to Brocc
description:
*Are you passionate about automation, modern workplace technologies and creating seamless user experiences? Brocc is searching for an IT Workplace Engineer who wants to shape their future workplace, drive automation, and support a growing fintech organization on an exciting journey.* 




  





**About the job** 




 This service is a direct recruitment, which means that the recruitment process takes place through Bravura and you are employed directly by Brocc.
 



  





**About the company** 




 Brocc was founded in 2016 as a Stockholm based fintech specialized in peer-to-peer lending. They have since then transitioned into an established, pan-European niche bank within consumer lending and debt management. Brocc is active in 15+ markets across Europe, and have offices in Sweden, Finland and UK.
 



  





 Brocc is in a strong growth phase, with both the scale and complexity of its operations increasing in line with new business areas, products, and international expansion. This creates an environment where the pace is high, decisions are business-critical, and the right expertise will play a central role in further developing the company’s financial structure, governance, and decision-making processes.
 



  





 They aim to build a stronger European ecosystem through transparent, data-driven, and fair financial solutions. Read more:
 
 www.brocc.se
 




  





**Tasks and responsibilities** 




 As an IT Workplace Engineer at Brocc, you will play a key role in shaping and building the company’s future digital workplace. You will work closely with internal teams such as Tech, Security and Platform, collaborating to develop a scalable and automated environment that supports Brocc’s growth in Sweden and the UK. While you will begin with more hands-on responsibilities to understand the internal setup, the main focus of the role is to identify bottlenecks and automate and streamline all workplace processes — from device management to onboarding flows and identity lifecycle.
 



  





 With the 1st line IT support outsourced to an external partner, the majority of your role involves designing and improving internal workflows. You will be responsible for developing automated onboarding and offboarding processes and work with Intune and Microsoft 365 to modernize device management, establish configuration standards, and create self-service tools that reduce manual support needs. You will also handle the in-between tasks that requires access to Broccs environment, such as troubleshooting of on-site issues and the technical setup of the office.
 



  





 As the internal workplace environment evolves, your main responsibilities include:
 


* Developing, improving and automating onboarding, offboarding and internal workflow processes
* Managing Microsoft 365, Intune and device lifecycle across macOS and Windows environments
* Handling on-site troubleshooting, meeting room support and internal IT requests when needed
* Collaborating with external IT provider and ensuring smooth delivery of internal services
* Identifying opportunities to implement automation and AI-based improvements across the workplace environment



  





**Education, experience and personal characteristics** 



* Minimum 4 years of experience as an IT Support Engineer or similar position
* Strong knowledge of Microsoft 365, Azure AD / Entra, Intune and endpoint management
* Good understanding of both macOS and Windows
* Experience with scripting (PowerShell, Bash, or Python)
* Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across teams
* Fluency in English (written and spoken)



  





 It is desirable if you also have:
 


* Experience from scale-ups, fintech or fast-growing tech environments
* Experience automating manual IT processes
* Experience working with external IT service providers
* Swedish language skills



  





 We believe you are curious, solution-oriented and eager to learn. You enjoy understanding how things work and finding smarter, more automated ways to do them. You appreciate both hands-on support work and long-term technical improvements. You communicate clearly, collaborate well with colleagues, and contribute positively to the team culture. Most importantly, you are motivated by building something modern, scalable and efficient.
 



  





**Other information** 



* Start: Upon agreement, as soon as possible
* Location: Stockholm (new office-location in Central Stockholm). Office-first policy with preferred 4 days/week at the office
* Salary: Upon agreement



  





 We use a competency-based method in all recruitment processes to ensure unbiased selection. If you are considered for the position, we will contact you for an initial interview. Regardless of whether you proceed in the process or not, you will receive feedback on your application.
 



  





 If you have questions about the role or about your application, you are welcome to contact our support at:
 



 📧
 
 info@bravura.se
 




 📞 (+46) 010-171 47 10
 



  





 We recommend that you submit your application immediately as we make a continuous selection.
 



  





 Welcome with your application!

title: Client & Consulting Executive
description:
B2C | COPENHAGEN / AARHUS
   

  

**Do you dream of shaping the future for leading consumer brands? At IMPACT, we’re seeking to strengthen our B2C/Retail Client & Consulting muscles to drive transformative growth for our clients, act as a trusted advisor and strategic partner.**
**About The Job**
 This is your unique opportunity to play a central role in defining digital roadmaps, nurturing high-level relationships, and steering complex programs with purpose and clarity. You will own client relationships and lead the charge on consulting engagements, while partnering with C-level leaders (CDOs, CMOs, CIOs, etc.), identifying new growth opportunities and ensuring project success and stakeholder alignment. Working hand-in-hand with our delivery teams, you will help clients unlock the power of digital to meet their ambitions - today as well as into the future.
   

  

 The position at IMPACT is for you, who thrives to
   

  

* Turn ambition into action by designing bold digital strategies and roadmaps that truly move the needle for our clients.
* Lead the charge on high-impact consulting engagements in the fast-evolving worlds of retail, D2C, and omnichannel.
* Fuel growth by spotting and seizing opportunities to expand client partnerships through smart cross- and upselling initiatives.
* Be the trusted voice that digital leaders turn to guiding C-level decision-makers and middle managers alike with confidence and clarity.
* Inspire and align teams by orchestrating complex projects, delegating with purpose, and creating a collaborative, energized environment.
* Pitch ideas that win, shaping standout business proposals that captivate clients and deliver measurable results.
* Own the outcome driving satisfaction, retention, and performance across a portfolio of clients generating €1–5M+ annually.


 YOUR PROFILE
   

  

 You are experienced within leading complex digital commerce transformations, driving strategic consulting across retail, D2C, and omnichannel landscapes, while building strong, trust-based client relationships.
   

  

 Thus, we expect you to demonstrate
   

  

* A strategic mindset with strong communication and analytical skills
* A natural connector who builds trust with clients and teams alike
* Experience with omnichannel, loyalty, personalization, and digital transformation
* Proven ability to drive business development and innovation


 We imagine you have 5-8 years' experience in management consulting or project/program leadership with a strong focus on Commerce. Additionally, you could have an educational background within IT, business, finance, or management (BSc or MSc).
   

  

 Finally, we are looking for a colleague and team member who can contribute to a fun and professional work environment at IMPACT while ensuring a high standard in collaboration with your colleagues.
   

  

 LIFE AT IMPACT
   

  

 For more than 20 years, IMPACT has pioneered some of the most advanced commerce solutions in the Nordics. What started in Aarhus, Denmark has grown into a European powerhouse with offices across the world.
   

  

 While we cover all the major tech platforms and work with some of the most exciting businesses, we make a sincere effort to stay down-to-earth. It’s who we are, and it’s the kind of talent we want to attract. We empower people and businesses to drive positive change and quality experiences, and we’re not afraid to take the lead on shaping the future of commerce.
   

  

 Today, we’re a global team of digital talents working to strategize, craft, and support all things tech. We push the boundaries for commerce with curiosity, ambition, and empowerment that cements the ambition to
 **change commerce for the better** 
 . But it’s not all about size. Because more than anything, we want to maintain our collective can-do attitude that creates a working environment where everything is possible – and have fun while doing it.
   

  

 CONTACT
   

  

 Sound like an opportunity for you? Send your CV via the link below.
   

  

 Interviews are held on an ongoing basis, as the position is to be filled as soon as possible.
   

  

 If you have any questions, you are welcome to contact Executive Search Specialist Christian Kerrn-Jespersen +45 23299249.
   

  

 We are looking forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 For more than 20 years, IMPACT has pioneered some of the most advanced commerce solutions in the Nordics. What started in Aarhus, Denmark has grown into a European powerhouse with offices across the world.
   

  

 Today, we’re a global team of digital talents working to strategize, craft, and support all things tech. We push the boundaries for commerce with curiosity, ambition, and empowerment that cements the ambition to
 **change commerce for the better** 
 . But it’s not all about size. Because more than anything, we want to maintain our collective can-do attitude that creates a working environment where everything is possible – and have fun while doing it.

title: Information Security Specialist
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**The role**
 At Legora, protecting our clients' highly sensitive legal data is fundamental to everything we do. We're building a security and compliance program designed for the AI era: Zero Trust architecture, rigorous governance, and continuous compliance as non-negotiables.
   

  

 We are expanding our security team to help shape, drive, and scale our governance, risk, and compliance programs. You will work at the intersection of policy, risk management, audit readiness, and cutting-edge technology to ensure we maintain ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, and ISO 42001 compliance while enabling the business to move fast. This is a hands-on, high-impact role where you'll manage our Information Security Management System (ISMS), conduct risk assessments, coordinate audits, and serve as a trusted advisor to both internal teams and external clients. Your strength will be your knowledge of the E2E processes of how our product is built. You will utilize this to treat security risks in a modern way that fits our modern tech stack.
   

  

* This is a Stockholm-based, 5-day in-office role since we believe building together in person drives better outcomes at this stage of our journey.


**What You Will Be Doing**
* Own and maintain the ISMS in accordance with ISO 27001 and ISO 42001, ensuring all policies, procedures, and controls are documented, implemented, and continuously improved.
* Lead the company's compliance efforts for SOC 2 Type II and support future SOX ITGC readiness, working closely with Finance and Engineering to map business processes and establish IT controls.
* Develop, implement, and maintain information security policies, standards, and procedures that are lightweight, actionable, and aligned with regulatory frameworks including GDPR, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and ISO 42001.
* Conduct regular risk assessments, threat modeling, and gap analyses to identify security risks and prioritize remediation efforts across the organization.
* Coordinate internal and external audits, penetration tests, and compliance assessments — ensuring continuous audit readiness and managing remediation plans.
* Manage vendor risk by conducting third-party security reviews, due diligence assessments, and ongoing vendor monitoring programs.
* Be a primary point of contact for client security questionnaires, due diligence requests, audit reports (SOC 2, ISO certificates), and contractual security commitments.
* Support secure AI governance by defining policies and controls that protect data in AI workflows, prevent adversarial use, and ensure responsible AI practices aligned with ISO 42001.
* Drive security awareness and training across the organization, including new joiners and regular security education sessions.
* Collaborate with Engineering teams on incident response planning, ensuring lessons learned are incorporated into policies and risk management processes.
* Track and report on security metrics, KPIs, and compliance status to leadership, providing actionable insights and recommendations.


**Who You Are**
* You have 7+ years of experience in GRC, information security, compliance, or audit roles, ideally in a high-growth technology or SaaS environment. Alternatively you are an experienced software engineer who is transitioning into Information Security.
* You have hands-on experience implementing and managing ISO 27001 and SOC 2 Type II, NIST 800-53 compliant compliance programs. You might have achieved desirable certifications such as CISSP, CISM, CISA, or ISO 27001 Lead Auditor.
* You have knowledge of governance frameworks, risk management methodologies, and data protection regulations (ERM, GDPR, CCPA, ISO 42001, SOX ITGC).
* You understand Zero Trust principles and OWASP top 10 risks and how to apply them across identity, devices, dev-ops processes and cloud services.
* You can confidently engage with technical teams on topics like cloud security (Azure), infrastructure-as-code, secure development practices, and AI system security.
* You have strong analytical and organizational skills, with the ability to remain focus amongst multiple audits, assessments, and compliance initiatives.
* You have excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, able to translate security & compliance requirements into clear, actionable guidance for technical and non-technical audiences.
* Experience with securing AI/ML workflows and building automation with GenAI tools (for example Zapier, n8n) is a big plus.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: AI/ML Model Insights & Visualization Analyst - Financial Crime Prevention
description:
**Job ID: 3215**
 We are looking for a full-time employment agreement for a role bridging the domains of data analyses; AI and ML model insights; visualizations to ensure compliance with requirements related AI and ML models quality, transparency, explainability and performance tracking
   

  

**About Our Team**
 Meet the Advanced Analytics team in FCIIA Monitoring. Our role is to fight financial crime through monitoring products. In our team we ensure Nordea can utilize cutting edge technologies like ML and AI in a well governed, structured and systematic manner to capture financial crime risk.
   

  

 Advanced Analytics team consists of 8 highly skilled data analysts working under FCIIA Monitoring unit in Group Financial Crime Prevention. The team works with risk identification, implementation of transaction monitoring custom controls, management insights and monitoring of control performance. We are evenly spread across Nordics with team members in Denmark, Finland and Sweden.
   

  

 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in how we work and how we make decisions – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
 Main responsibilities in this role: In the role as AI and ML insights and visualizations you will have a significant impact in quality assurance, simplifying the complexity of AI and ML model internals into digestible, easy to understand management insights and model performance visualization. A role with high demand for combining deep knowledge in visualization, understanding of AI and ML models internal data representations as well as deep understanding of risk taxonomy.
   

  

* Understand how predictive models like Random Forest, XG Boost and Neural Networks work in the context of a specific implementation (training)
* Design data models for visualizations based on various AI and ML predictive models
* Build Power BI dashboards to provide insights of model performance
* Translate and explain complex data models, and result into easy to understand structured story


**Who You Are**
 This is the right role for you if you strive in a complex, exploratory environment and you enjoy figuring out solution and thinking out of the box while keeping data driven approach. The role requires strong analytical skills alongside excellent communication skills to navigate complex and challenging problems related to financial crime prevention, governance and stakeholder management.
   

  

**Your background and skills include:**
* Acedemic degree in statistics, mathematics, computer science, economics, or a related field
* Power BI, Power BI server or equivalent dashboard stack
* Proven experience in data analysis, preferably within the financial services industry or related fields
* SQL and Data Modeling for visualizations
* AI and ML predictive model understanding including feature importance
* Clear communication skills to convey complex findings to stakeholders


**It would be ideal if you also have:**
* Experience working with Cloud Technologies
* Understanding Financial Crime Risk and Typologies
* SAFe / Agile basic understanding


**What We Offer**
**People** 
 come here when they want to get somewhere. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

**A culture** 
 that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

**Hybrid working model** 
 – we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusion** 
 are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Please submit your application as soon as possible as we start with interviews on ongoing basis. For more information, you’re welcome to contact Aleksander Tsvetanov Kitov at aleksandar.kitov@nordea.com.
   

  

**We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.**
**We build relationships** 
 . We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

**We learn and develop.** 
 We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

**We lead change** 
 . We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

**We are Nordea** 
 . We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Finland:** 
 A security clearance will be performed for the person selected for this position.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Sweden:** 
 For union information, please contact finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACONordea@nordea.com.

title: Business Intelligence Solution Architect
description:
*Har du erfarenhet som lösningsarkitekt inom datalager och analyslösningar? Är du redo för nästa steg i din karriär med möjligheter och flexibilitet som ledord? Vill du skapa riktigt värde genom lösningar inom datalager och analysmodeller? Läs vidare om vårt datadrivna team!*
 Vem är du?
   

  

 Du brinner sannolikt lite extra för teknik och ser det därför som en naturlig del att hålla dig uppdaterad om vad som händer och trendar inom teknikens värld.
   

  

 Genom ditt driv och ansvarstagande ser du till att våra kunder får bästa möjliga lösning som stödjer deras verksamhet. Du är även en prestigelös lagspelare och kan leda olika konstellationer av utvecklingsteam.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som
   

  

* har 4-8 års erfarenhet av design och utveckling av BI-lösningar
